summary: Completed testing of KKTCX platform iteration 9 features. Backend: 19/21 tests passed (2 skipped due to missing test partner). Frontend: All requested features verified working. Fixed 1 bug in AdminUsers.js (undefined roleFilter variable).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 9 features verified working. Fixed AdminUsers.js bug (roleFilter undefined). Test partner account (princess.0@kktcx.test) not available for login testing.
